WakeUpPoseidon2ED_2.english: I ordered a strawberry shortcake, an Americano, and an iced tea… uh… what was next?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_2.korean: 주문은 딸기 쇼트케이크에… 아메리카노 한 잔… 그리고… 아이스티에… 후에엥… 다음은 뭐였죠…?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_3.english: Hey! Start over from the beginning!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_4.english: You should be able to memorize that easily!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_5.english: The real thing doesn’t end here, you know?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_6.english: Before we only helped with simple tasks for the Hounds, who were busy with band practice, but this time we’re actually opening the shop ourselves, so we can’t afford any mistakes.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_6.korean: 전에는 밴드 연습으로 바쁜 하운드 애들 대신 간단한 업무 지원을 한게 고작이지만, 이번엔 우리가 직접 가게를 여는 거니까 실수하면 안 돼.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.english: I was just standing still… why did I get dragged here?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.korean: 로데는 그냥 가만히 있었을 뿐인데… 왜 여기로 끌려온 건가요…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_9.english: I’m telling you, I’m not a maid.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_10.english: It’s Cafe Poseidon, so there’s no choice, right? If we’re doing this, we should all pitch in together!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_10.korean:
카페 포세이돈이니까 어쩔 수 없잖아?
할 거면 다 같이 해야지!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_11.english: Alright, after practice you can eat as much cake as you want.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_11.korean: 자자, 연습 끝나면 케이크 마음껏 먹어도 되니까.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_13.english: Okay… but you have to give me the cake, right?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_13.korean: 알았어요… 대신 꼭 케이크 주셔야 해요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_14.english: Yes, I’ve taken an order for a warm latte.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_14.korean: 네, 따뜻한 라떼 한 잔 주문 받았습니다.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_15.english: The shot is Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, natural, medium‑light roast, 18 g dose for 36 g extraction, pre‑infusion at 93 °C for 7 s, total extraction 28 s. Pre‑heat the mug to 80 °C, use whole milk instead of low‑fat, make a very thin micro‑foam, and for the latte art you want a six‑layer Rosetta rather than a heart, right?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_15.korean: 샷은 에티오피아 예가체프 내추럴로 미디엄 라이트 로스트, 도징 18g 추출 36g 비율에 93도 프리 인퓨전은 7초, 총 추출은 28초. 머그컵은 80도 예열에 우유는 저지방 말고 전지 우유로, 거품은 마이크로 폼 아주 얇게, 라떼아트는 하트 말고 로제타 6겹 말씀이시죠?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_16.english: I’ll have it ready shortly. Please wait a moment.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_17.korean: 자, 따뜻한 라떼 한 잔 나왔습니다.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_22.english: Triton, could you make some tasty coffee too!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_23.english: I’ll help so we don’t lose to Stronghold!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_23.korean: 스트롱홀드에게 지지 않도록 나도 도와줄 테니까!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_25.english: <All systems check… integration complete… no operational issues>
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_25.korean: <모든 시스템 작동 점검… 연동 완료… 운영 이상 없음>

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_26.english: <High‑quality coffee production by a military corporation is possible at any time>
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_26.korean: <언제든 군사 기업의 고품질 커피 제조 가능>

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_31.english: Captain Gamma, have you gotten any practice in?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_33.english: Ca— Cafe… Posei—… Money… Uh, welcome… M— M— Master… Master…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_33.korean: 카, 카페… 포세이… 돈에… 어, 어서 오세요… 주… 주… 주인… 주인님…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_34.english: Hmm… your voice is too low.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_35.english: Could you speak a little louder, please!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_36.english: Like the usual Captain Gamma—cool and confident!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_36.korean: 평소의 감마 대장님처럼 멋지게! 자신감 넘치게!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_39.english: How’s that! Are you satisfied with this!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_40.english: I like it… but I think all the timid customers will run away.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_40.korean: 저는 좋은데… 겁 많은 손님은 전부 도망갈 것 같네요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_41.english: Didn’t you tell me to do that!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_43.english: Even while shy~ but without losing confidence~ in a gentle voice… can’t we do it?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_43.korean: 부끄러워하면서도~ 자신감은 잃지 않고~ 상냥한 목소리로… 어떻게 안 될까요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_45.english: You can do it, Captain Gamma!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_46.english: Since you declared you’d do it, you’ll do it properly… you said so!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_46.korean: 하겠다고 선언한 이상 제대로 하실 거라고… 선언하셨잖아요!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_47.english: Fine, I’ll do it as much as you want!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_49.english: Alright, next up, with a shy expression~ hehehe~

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_51.english: If I’ve said I’ll do it, I’ll see it through.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_53.english: All of us running a café together, getting along nicely…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_54.english: Haha, I’m not really in a position to lecture the dragon, either.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_54.korean: 하하, 나도 용에게 뭐라 할 처지는 아닌 것 같군.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_55.english: My old self would never have imagined this.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_55.korean: 예전의 나라면 상상도 못 했을 테니.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_59.english: You’re from Horizon… were you called Sirene?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_61.english: We’ve clashed countless times before, so I’d recognize you.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_61.korean: 과거에 ‘너희들’이랑은 수도 없이 싸웠으니, 모를 리가 없지.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_63.english: So, what do you need from me?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_66.english: And? Are you here to issue a challenge to a rival?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_66.korean: 그래서? 경쟁 상대한테 선전포고라도 하러 왔나?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_68.english: Maybe if it were the old you… but now you’re one of Orca’s own, right?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_68.korean: 이전의 당신이라면 몰라도… 지금은 같은 오르카의 일원이잖아요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_69.english: And… I’ve gotten a lot of help from Merlin, too.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_69.korean: 그리고… 멀린 씨에게 큰 도움도 받았고요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_71.english: Just tell me if you need anything.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_72.english: Actually, I’m the manager of Café Horizon.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_72.korean: 이래 봬도 저는 카페 호라이즌의 점장이니까요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_74.english: Do you think I’m the type who can ask others for help?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_74.korean: 너는 내가 누군가에게 도와 달라고 말할 수 있는 자라 생각하나?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_75.english: It’s not odd to ask a fellow comrade for assistance.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_75.korean: 같은 동료에게 도움을 부탁하는 건 이상한 일이 아니니까요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_81.english: Orca really is a fun place, after all.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_82.english: Then, I’d like you to give me some advice.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_82.korean: 그럼 한 가지 조언을 해 줬으면 좋겠어.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_85.english: If I just act like I always do, the customers will get scared and run off, they say.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_85.korean: 평소대로만 행동하면 손님들이 무서워서 다 도망갈 거라더군.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_86.english: I know that, but being gentle with them isn’t easy.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_86.korean: 알고는 있어도 부드럽게 접대하는 게 쉽지가 않아.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_87.english: I see… Some members might not even bother… but it could depend on the customer.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_87.korean: 그렇군요... 전혀 신경 안 쓸 대원들도 있겠지만… 손님에 따라선 그럴 수도 있겠네요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_89.english: Will you teach me how to treat guests properly?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_89.korean: 나한테 ‘손님 접대 잘하는 방법’ 좀 전수해 주겠어?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_90.english: Hmm… I thought you could already be gentle enough…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_90.korean: 으음… 저는 당신이 충분히 부드럽게 할 수 있을 거라고 생각했는데요…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_91.english: Huh? Me? What makes you think that?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_92.english: Well… when I see Meropé… or Rhode…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_92.korean: 그야… 메로페 씨나… 로데 씨를 보면…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_93.english: Why are those names popping up now?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_93.korean: 여기서 그 녀석들 이름이 왜 나와?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_95.english: Why did you decide to run a café?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_96.english: I once told Merlin I’d do it with him.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_96.korean: 예전에 멀린에게 같이 해 주겠다고 말했거든.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_97.english: I never expected it would actually happen.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_97.korean: 정말로 하게 될 줄은 몰랐지만 말이야.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_99.english: Think about it a bit more.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_100.english: There must be some reason you, who never cared about cafés, decided to take this on…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_100.korean: 카페에 관심 없던 당신이 '하겠다'고 마음먹은 이유가… 분명 있을 거예요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_101.english: So that's the reason I decided…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_102.english: If we run a café together and whip up some tasty drinks for Arthur…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_102.korean: 저랑 같이 카페를 해서… 맛있는 음료를 아서에게 만들어 준다면

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_103.english: Arthur will definitely be happy to drink them!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_103.korean: 아서도 분명 기뻐하면서 마셔 줄 거라구요!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_104.english: Don’t you want to see Arthur grin while sipping a beverage you made yourself, Captain?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_104.korean: 대장님이 직접 만든 음료를 마시면서 웃는 아서의 모습… 보고 싶지 않으세요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_110.english: I guess that means I’m a member of Orca, just like you.
